rationale.oversight-explanation: Shows dependencies, summaries, and exact AI-bound context before generation.
rationale.counterpoint: Opposes opaque automation that removes developer judgment and control.
rationale.built-system: Authors implemented an open-source, modular Lumen prototype.
rationale.assistive: Developers explicitly trigger snippet-level help through a double-copy interaction.
rationale.steering: Developers inspect, select, and refine context provided for generation.
